title: MVP SMP | BULLETIN BOARD
excerpt: MVP SMP S4.6 issues a stark warning after multiple permanent bans, including that of member 'Loweroff,' reinforcing that server rules and safety take precedence over any user's contribution.
content:
EDITORIAL NOTE: ENHANCED BY RAPID WITH 

ON THE AFTERNOON, JUNE 16, 2026 LOWEROFF WAS PERMANENTLY BAN AND ALL MEMBERS OF MVP SMP WERE SHOCKED WITH ITS STATUS OF SERVER.

THIS IS THE THING WHERE GETS INTERESTED, ONE THING Y'ALL THINK NO MATTER WHAT YOUR CONTRIBUTION IS, BIG OR SMALL, VIOLATION OF THE LAW IS STILL NOT TOLERATED, AND THIS IS A LESSON FOR MEMBERS AND THE SERVER STAFF TEAM THAT CONTRIBUTION IS NOT BASED ON SOMETHING HAS BEEN VIOLATED.
